---
title: "sanitizeFlowContainer()"
description: "Clamp a flow container to finite, non-negative dimensions."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Clamp a flow container to finite, non-negative dimensions.

## Import

```ts
import { sanitizeFlowContainer } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/reactive-layout";
```

## Signature

```ts
function sanitizeFlowContainer(container: FlowContainer): FlowContainer
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `container` | `FlowContainer` | Input container values. |

## Returns

A sanitized container record.

## Example

```ts
sanitizeFlowContainer({ width: -1, height: 200 });
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/solutions/reactive-layout/flow.ts`
